description: Matrix mapping assessee type and income sources to the recommended ITR form. Use this as a quick reference table.

legend.RECOMMENDED: This form is the correct/primary form for this combination
legend.ALTERNATIVE: This form can be used as alternative in certain conditions
legend.NOT_APPLICABLE: This form cannot be used for this assessee/income combination

assesseeTypes.label: Association of Persons / Body of Individuals

combinations.incomeProfile: Only salary/pension, one house property, other sources ≤ ₹50L total
combinations.conditions: No capital gains, no business income, not a director, no unlisted shares, no foreign assets, not NRI, one property max

combinations.incomeProfile: Salary + any capital gains (LTCG/STCG) OR multiple properties OR director OR unlisted shares
combinations.conditions: No business income. If business income too, use ITR-3.
Includes salary, capital gains, house property in addition to business income

combinations.incomeProfile: Presumptive income u/s 44AD/44ADA/44AE, income ≤ ₹50L, up to 2 HPs, LTCG 112A ≤ ₹1.25L
combinations.conditions: No director status, no unlisted shares, no foreign assets, no capital losses CF
combinations.fy202526Note: FY 2025-26: Expanded to 2 house properties; LTCG 112A allowed within ₹1.25L; Cash/bank balance mandatory in Schedule BP

combinations.incomeProfile: India-sourced income: salary, house property, capital gains (no business)
combinations.conditions: NRIs cannot use ITR-1 or ITR-4 under any circumstances
combinations.fy202526Note: NRE account interest: exempt u/s 10(4). FCNR interest: exempt. NRO interest: taxable.

combinations.conditions: NRI with business income from India must use ITR-3
RNOR cannot use ITR-1. Must use ITR-2 minimum. If business income, use ITR-3.

combinations.incomeProfile: Investment income, house property, capital gains (no business)
Presumptive business income u/s 44AD or 44AE, income ≤ ₹50L
combinations.conditions: HUF is eligible for 44AD and 44AE but NOT 44ADA (professionals only). Expanded HP allowed in FY 2025-26.
HUF with regular business maintains books and files ITR-3
All partnership firms (registered or unregistered), LLPs, AOP, BOI file ITR-5

combinations.incomeProfile: All companies NOT claiming exemption u/s 11
combinations.conditions: Domestic companies, foreign companies, Section 8 companies not claiming u/s 11
combinations.fy202526Note: Section 115BAA (22% flat) and 115BAB (15% for new manufacturing) available

combinations.incomeProfile: Company registered u/s 12A/12AB claiming exemption u/s 11
combinations.conditions: Section 8 companies that are registered charitable institutions
Trust registered u/s 12A or 12AB with CBDT
Political parties registered with Election Commission file u/s 139(4B)
Institutions approved u/s 10(23C)(iii) to (vi) file ITR-7

matrix.assesseeLabel: Association of Persons / Body of Individuals

combinations.conditions: AOP/BOI not claiming u/s 11 exemption files ITR-5
Charitable AOP/BOI registered as charitable institution

quickReferenceTable.description: Simple lookup: Assessee Type → Eligible Forms
